do: Arrive from Act 6 — stash, vendor-check gems
Grab quests: Eramir (The Master of a Million Faces), Weylam Roth (Silver Locket + Kishara's Star)
Exit to The Broken Bridge
Cross the span to The Crossroads exit on the far side
IF you spot Weylam's buried lockbox on the way: grab the SILVER LOCKET (flask reward — only if it's on the path)
steps.tip: No waypoint in this zone — just run it.

do: Tag the waypoint mid-zone
Take the lower fork → The Fellshrine Ruins
steps.layout: Chamber of Sins is the other (north-west) exit — you WP back for it after the Crypt.
steps.tip: Alva spawns here — first Incursions if you want temple loot; skip when racing.

do: Push through to The Crypt entrance
steps.layout: Follow the ruined road — the Crypt entrance sits among the church ruins.

do: Tag the waypoint
DO the Trial of Ascendancy — first of two this act (Cruel Lab set)
Loot MALIGARO'S MAP from the Container of Sins
Waypoint (or logout → WP) → The Crossroads
steps.tip: Dead-end zone: trial + map container are both inside, sweep to the back.

do: Cross to the north-west exit → The Chamber of Sins Level 1
Tag the waypoint near the central chamber
Find Silk at the map device, place Maligaro's Map, enter the portal to Maligaro's Sanctum
steps.layout: WP, Silk and the map device all sit around the middle of the floor.

do: Kill Maligaro (Sin claims his essence — Essence of the Artist)
Kill the spider Black Death and loot the BLACK VENOM
Head back out to the Chamber of Sins
Give the Black Venom to Silk → take the OBSIDIAN KEY (Web of Secrets)
Open the way down to Level 2
DO the Trial of Ascendancy — second this act; with Act 6's Prison trial that's all three for Cruel Lab
Take Helena's secret passage out to The Den
Tag the waypoint
Push through the caves to The Ashen Fields
Tag the waypoint
At the ruined Forest Encampment: kill Greust, Lord of the Forest, then destroy the Ralakesh totem in the arena centre
Continue to The Northern Forest
steps.tip: The fight spawns bandit + beast adds — clear them, don't get surrounded.

do: Tag the waypoint
Take the side exit into The Dread Thicket
steps.layout: The Thicket is a dead-end branch; the Causeway exit is separate — you return here by WP.

do: Collect all 7 FIREFLIES (quest tracker counts them — the zone always has 7)
Find the Den of Despair and kill Gruthkul (+1 passive on turn-in)
LOGOUT to town
steps.tip: Fireflies glow on the ground — sweep methodically, a near-full clear finds them. Don't facetank Gruthkul's slams.

do: Turn in to Eramir: The Master of a Million Faces (+1 passive) and Queen of Despair (+1 passive)
Optional: boots from Helena (Essence of the Artist); take GREUST'S NECKLACE from Helena if you want the amulet
Waypoint → The Northern Forest
Head to the far exit → The Causeway
IF carrying Greust's Necklace and you pass the Azmeri shrine: place it (amulet from Helena later — skippable)
Tag the waypoint
Grab KISHARA'S STAR from the lockbox — usually near the far (Vaal City) end
Enter The Vaal City
steps.layout: One long flooded span — run it end to end.

do: Fight to the centre and tag the waypoint next to Yeena
Give Yeena the 7 fireflies — she burns open the Temple of Decay (Lighting the Way)
Waypoint → town
steps.layout: The centre is ringed by dead-end streets — trust the quest arrow, not your instincts.

do: Turn in Kishara's Star → Weylam Roth (+1 passive, +2 respec points)
Stash + vendor — last stop before the act boss
Waypoint → The Vaal City
Enter the burned-open gate → The Temple of Decay Level 1
Descend — find the stairs to Level 2
Kill Arakaali, Spinner of Shadows — big AoE plus waves of spider adds, keep moving
Exit through the passage beyond her arena → The Sarn Ramparts (Act 8)
steps.tip: Chaos res helps here. Target: level 52–54 leaving Act 7. Cruel Lab is now unlocked — run it from Aspirants' Plaza when you're ready.
